claim_id.description: Must be a UUID. The unique identifier of the claim.

created_at.description: The timestamp at which the claim was opened.

updated_at.description: The timestamp at which the claim was last updated.

policy_id.description: Must be a UUID. The identifier of the [policy](ref:policy) attached to this claim. May be `null` if no policy is linked yet.

policyholder_id.description: Must be a UUID. The identifier of the [policyholder](ref:policyholder) for this claim. May be `null` if no policyholder is linked yet.

member_id.description: Must be a UUID. The identifier of the member for this claim. Only used for group scheme policies. May be `null`.

covered_item_id.description: Must be a UUID. The identifier of the covered item that this claim is against. Required if the policy supports covered items.

claim_status.description: The current status of the claim.

approval_status.description: The approval decision status of the claim.

claimant.description: An object containing the claimant's details. `null` if no claimant is specified.

first_name.description: The first name of the claimant.

last_name.description: The last name of the claimant.

id_number.description: The ID number of the claimant.

cellphone.description: The cellphone number of the claimant.

email.description: The email address of the claimant.

relationship.description: The relationship of the claimant to the policyholder.

incident_type.description: A description of the incident type.

incident_cause.description: A description of the cause of the incident.

incident_date.description: The date on which the incident occurred.

assigned_to.description: Must be a UUID. The identifier of the user to whom this claim is assigned.

app_data.description: An object containing additional custom data for the claim.

module_data.description: An object containing data populated by the product module.

requested_amount.description: The requested payout amount (in cents) for the claim.

granted_amount.description: The granted payout amount (in cents) for the claim.

rejection_reason.description: The reason for claim rejection, if applicable.

currency.description: The currency code for monetary amounts (e.g., `ZAR`, `USD`).

created_by.description: An object indicating the user or API key that created the claim. See [Authentication](https://docs.rootplatform.com/reference/getting-started-1#created_by-field).

policyholder.description: The [policyholder](ref:policyholder) object. Only included when `include=policyholder` query parameter is specified.

policy.description: The [policy](ref:policy) object. Only included when `include=policy` query parameter is specified.

member.description: The member object for group scheme policies. Only included when available.

user_group.description: The user group object. Only included when `include=user_group` query parameter is specified.

block_states.description: An object containing the current state of claim blocks (dynamic form fields).
